title: Consistent Naming: Blackstone
description: A simple pack that renames Polished Blackstone Bricks and its variants to Blackstone Bricks, keeping them in line with other stone variants like Deepslate and Tuff!
body: A simple pack that renames Polished Blackstone Bricks and its variants to Blackstone Bricks, keeping them in line with other stone variants like Deepslate and Tuff!
